label: Autonomous software-engineering agents

node.label: Autonomous software-engineering agents
node.definition: Autonomous software-engineering agents inspect repositories, plan changes, edit files, execute tools, diagnose failures, and iterate toward tested patches.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Autonomous software-engineering agents is to connect Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence to downstream capabilities including Browser, desktop & computer-use agents, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems, Verified and assurance-gated agents.
examples: substrate for Browser, desktop & computer-use agents
substrate for Autonomous research & AI scientist systems
substrate for Verified and assurance-gated agents
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence.

dependencies.rationale: Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Observe–plan–act agent loops as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Reflection, critique, verifier & repair loops as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Human-in-the-loop, permissions & sandboxing as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Episodic memory as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Autonomous software-engineering agents integrates Skill libraries, workflows & procedural plans as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

The role of Autonomous software-engineering agents is to connect Observe–plan–act agent loops, Code models, copilots & repository intelligence to downstream capabilities including Browser, desktop & computer-use agents, Autonomous research & AI scientist systems, Verified and assurance-gated agents.
